name: Hampta Pass Trek
description: A dramatic crossover from lush Kullu Valley to the barren moonscape of Lahaul. Hampta Pass is the perfect introduction to high-altitude trekking.

name: Bhrigu Lake Trek
description: A glacial lake at 4,300m surrounded by alpine meadows. 360° views of Pir Panjal and Dhauladhar ranges. One of the best weekend treks from Manali.

name: Kheerganga Trek
best_months: Mar, Apr, May, Jun, Sep, Oct, Nov
description: From Barshaini through dense forests and waterfalls to natural hot springs at the summit. One of Himachal's most popular treks.

name: Triund Trek
best_months: Mar, Apr, May, Jun, Sep, Oct, Nov, Dec
description: The crown jewel of weekend treks. Jaw-dropping views of snow-capped Dhauladhar range and the Kangra Valley spreading below.

name: Pin Parvati Pass
permits: Required from forest dept Kullu and SDM Kaza
description: One of the most challenging treks in Himachal — crossing from lush Parvati Valley to barren Pin Valley over a 5,319m pass.

name: Prashar Lake Trek
best_months: Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Sep, Oct, Nov, Dec
description: A serene floating-island lake at 2,730m with a 13th-century pagoda-style temple. One of the best winter treks in Himachal.

name: Chandrakhani Pass
description: An ancient trade route from Kullu to Malana. Crosses Chandrakhani Pass at 3,660m. Ends at enigmatic Malana village — one of the oldest democracies in the world.

name: Beas Kund Trek
description: Trek to the glacial source of the Beas River. Meadows of Dhundi and Bakarthach with views of Shitidhar, Friendship Peak, and Hanuman Tibba.
